name: Achieve
description_short: Achieve Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving Lorain, Cuyahoga, Erie, and Medina counties in Ohio since 1958, offering savings, checking, loans, and credit cards with personalized service.
description_long:
Achieve Credit Union was founded in 1958 as Midview Credit Union by a group of teachers at Midview High School in Grafton, Ohio. It has grown into a local credit union deeply rooted in its community with a mission to support members in learning, dreaming, and achieving their financial goals. As a member-owned, not-for-profit institution regulated by the NCUA, Achieve operates with a stated commitment to service excellence, integrity, respect, and professionalism.

Achieve offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including basic and secure checking accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, IRAs, certificates of deposit, vehicle loans, home equity loans, credit cards, and loan protection services. They also provide digital banking services such as online and mobile banking, bill pay, remote deposit capture, and the SecurLOCK tool for card controls and alerts. Business members can access business deposit and loan products. The credit union maintains physical branches in Elyria, Lorain, and LaGrange, and provides nationwide ATM and shared branch access through the CO-OP network covering over 30,000 ATMs and 5,000+ shared branches.

Achieve differentiates itself through its local community focus and emphasis on personalized service rather than corporate banking practices. The institution highlights its commitment to community impact and financial education, hosting an annual meeting celebrating member growth and offering scholarships to young adults. Their geographic membership eligibility is specifically tied to living, working, worshiping, or attending school in their four-county service area, creating a localized member base. Current promotional rates include vehicle loans as low as 4.49% APR, home equity loans as low as 5.50% APR, and share certificates at 3.75% APY for six-month terms.

Achieve Credit Union is a legitimate, NCUA-insured financial institution suitable for consumers in its service territory seeking traditional banking services with a community-oriented approach. The primary limitation is geographic: membership is restricted to four specific Ohio counties, making this institution inaccessible to those outside Lorain, Cuyahoga, Erie, and Medina counties. Like most credit unions, member benefits and service quality depend on maintaining membership eligibility and account activity.
services: CO-OP ATM and Shared Branch access
pros: NCUA-insured member accounts up to $250,000 per account category
Nationwide ATM and shared branch access through CO-OP network (30,000+ ATMs, 5,000+ branches)
Membership restricted to specific service area creates local focus and community accountability
Competitive loan rates: vehicle loans as low as 4.49% APR and home equity loans as low as 5.50% APR
Comprehensive digital banking including mobile app, online banking, bill pay, and remote deposit
Offers young adult scholarships and demonstrated community impact programs
Member-owned structure means profits can be returned to members rather than shareholders
cons: Geographic membership restriction limits access to Lorain, Cuyahoga, Erie, and Medina counties in Ohio only
Limited branch network (3 physical locations) compared to national banks
Credit card APR starts at 8.90%, which is higher than some national card issuers
No mention of account opening bonuses or promotional incentives for new members
Limited transparency on specific account fees, minimum balances, or overdraft policies on homepage
best_for: Ohio residents in Lorain, Cuyahoga, Erie, or Medina counties seeking relationship-based banking
Borrowers looking for competitive vehicle and home equity loan rates with local service
Community-minded depositors who prefer member-owned, not-for-profit financial institutions
Individuals wanting nationwide ATM access combined with local branch relationships
diagnosis: Achieve Credit Union is best for Ohio residents in its four-county service area who value community banking, competitive loan rates, and member-owned structure over national brand convenience. The primary caveat is geographic restriction—membership is only available to those living, working, worshiping, or attending school in Lorain, Cuyahoga, Erie, or Medina counties in Ohio.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Achieve — Credit Union in ELYRIA, OH | CreditDoc
meta_description: Achieve — NCUA-insured credit union in ELYRIA, OH. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
